title: valeriana pratensis subsp. angustifolia
intro: Valeriana pratensis subsp. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved valerian or Valerian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including sedative, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help to reduce stress, anxiety, and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Valeriana pratensis subsp. angustifolia include improved sleep quality, reduced muscle cramps and spasms, and relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Valerian root is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
